title: EMBERHOLD II — Embers of the Long Night
tagline: Build the chain. Hold the line. Outlast the dark moon.
blurb: Mine, farm and forge along the river, research new tech, grow your settlers, then ring the hold with arrow, frost and cannon towers before the husks — and the Warlord — swarm in.
whatsNew: Day-1 onboarding: a starter settlement (cabin, farm, lumberyard & tower) plus a step-by-step Getting Started guide
Balance pass — gentler first nights, a reachable Gunnery branch, a tougher Hearth and a fairer, beatable dark-moon WARLORD
Production chains: 5 resources feed a workshop, powder mill, tools & ammo economy
A 7-node research tree gating fisheries, cannons, frost towers, manors, infirmaries & more
Terrain map with forest, ore and water nodes you build beside for +50% bonuses
Richer nights: spitters, stalkers, brutes plus an escalating dark-moon WARLORD boss
Juicier feel — dawn 'Night Held' celebration, settler-growth pops, sparks, shake & dedicated sfx
Events — wandering traders, refugees to shelter, and disasters (blight, fire, quakes)
Categorised build menu with tooltips, costs, storage caps, threat warnings & win/lose ranks
